testcase.name: testJwtForgeryAndIdor

testcase.name: testDoubleCompletion

error.message: could not execute statement [ERROR: duplicate key value violates unique constraint "users_email_key" Detail: Key (email)=(double@test.com) already exists.] [insert into users (current_streak,email,last_action_date,level,longest_streak,password,username,xp,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]; SQL [insert into users (current_streak,email,last_action_date,level,longest_streak,password,username,xp,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]; constraint [users_email_key]
